nodes.label: Open thread: verify /__dbcheck Postgres logging then remove it
nodes.rationale: Temporary GET /__dbcheck route (commit 99e24d0) reuses the real logger DB pool to confirm Postgres event logging actually writes rows before the route is reverted, closing the long-standing 'is logging real?' question tied to commit b91d829's validation-nudge logging.

nodes.label: Error popup split by kind: validation vs error
nodes.rationale: validation (missing input/wrong order) shows a friendly nudge with no code/red/support line, while error (real failure) shows a full technical dialog; single choke point core/respondError.js, sanitized logger.js allowlist widened to code/kind only, no PII.

nodes.label: TRIAL_MODE config flag
nodes.rationale: core/config.js TRIAL_MODE defaults true; served via GET /config.js as window.TRIAL_MODE; shows the error code as a muted caption under validation nudges when trial mode is on.

nodes.label: Backlog: verify discipline learning loop fires per search
nodes.rationale: Only one discipline file exists (rf-hardware-engineering-technical-program-management.json); STATUS flags this as 'verify, not build' — confirm whether Researcher→Curator actually fires and updates files or is built-but-dormant.

nodes.label: Mode B — market/scrape mode backlog cluster
